REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (144-146 Buena Vista Ave.)
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $975,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property subject to posting of bond in the amount of $975,000.00, waiver of bond or portion of proceeds being placed into a blocked account (subject to review and receipt of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Aguerre.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Continued To May-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney and the Successor Administrator for failure to file a Petition for Final Distribution or Report of Status of Administration of the Estate, and to appear and show why the Estate should be permitted to continue. The return date is May 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. If the above said documents are not filed by close of business April 30, 2010, sanctions/surcharges may be imposed.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

Upon further review, the Court found that a request for continuance had been submitted by Counsel. The matter was continued to May 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Show Cause will not be issued.
